response.justification: Szabo is a strong generalist engineer with recent exposure to AI infrastructure and agentic workflows, but fundamentally misses the core requirement of 8+ years developing AI-driven solutions in production. Critical technical gaps include no Python experience, zero demonstrated knowledge of vector databases and RAG architectures, and only 2 months in an AI-focused role. While the trajectory is promising, the candidate appears to be transitioning into AI rather than bringing the depth of AI systems expertise this staff-level position demands.
strengths: Strong TypeScript and backend engineering across 18+ years, with multiple staff-level roles demonstrating ability to build and ship production systems at scale
Currently building agentic workflows and MCP infrastructure at re:cinq, showing active movement into the GenAI space with relevant technical exposure
Proven track record of mentoring teams, technical leadership, and knowledge-sharing across diverse domains and tech stacks
concerns: No Python in skillset despite being a required language; entire AI-development toolchain is built around Python, making this a significant gap
Only 2 months of AI-focused experience versus the required 8+ years building production AI solutions; candidate appears to be entering the domain rather than bringing deep expertise
No evidence of vector database experience, RAG architectures, LLM optimization metrics, or multi-agent system frameworks beyond very recent MCP work
